_description: Character + product + scene + expression. Stage 3. This produces Frame A (opening frame). Attach character ref + product ref.
_usage: Two reference images: (1) locked character, (2) product packshot. Fill variables from character.json and product.json.

image_2.instruction: [FILL: 'This is the product. Maintain EXACTLY:' + key visual elements from product.json packaging.label_elements]

mood.emotion: [FILL: per script - Frame A expression at 30% intensity]
mood.facial_expression: [FILL: specific muscles, asymmetry, second of emotion]

pose.head_and_gaze: Looking slightly off-camera, 2-3 degrees right. Chin slightly down. Head tilt: [FILL]
pose.framing: Chest-up selfie. Off-center. Horizon tilted. Phone below frame NOT visible

phone_hand.action: Below frame, phone NOT visible. Only finger edge

product_hand.action: Holding product at chest height, slightly to one side
product_hand.grip: Natural casual grip. NOT display hold. Like holding a bag of chips. Fingers partially cover label. Brand name visible but not perfectly framed. Fingers wrap around middle, slightly crumpling flexible packaging
product_hand.visibility: Full hand visible gripping product. All 5 fingers accounted for (some behind product)

product_integration.position: Product at chest/collarbone level. Does NOT block face or expression. Product in lower area of frame, face in upper area
product_integration.angle: 20-30 degrees turned from camera. NOT perfectly facing camera. Label 60-70% readable
product_integration.lighting_match: SAME light source as face. Same shadow direction, same color temperature. Product exists in same physical space as person
product_integration.condition: Slightly used: opened, handled, part of daily routine. Not pristine factory-fresh

environment.setting: [FILL: per script. ALL IN SHARP FOCUS]

camera.DOF: DEEP. Face AND product AND background all sharp. NO blur
camera.distortion: 23mm selfie distortion on face and product

lighting.on_product: SAME light as face. Same highlights, shadows, color temperature. Product is lit by environment, NOT separately
